title: You can now control Google Chrome with OpenAI's Codex: Here's how to set it up
snippet: OpenAI has launched a new Codex extension for Chrome allows users to control the browser via the AI assistant. Codex can be used to accessing tasks like emails and updating records.&nbsp;

title: Meta quietly removes end-to-end encryption from Instagram: What does it mean for your private DMs?
snippet: Instagram has discontinued end-to-end encryption on the platform, meaning user messages are now only protected by standard encryption.

title: Anthropic fixes its 'evil' AI problem, explains why Claude resorted to blackmail

title: Forget LCD and score a nice AMOLED smartwatch at discount during Amazon Sale 2026

title: Nintendo sets Switch 2 price at $499.99, forecasts 16.5 million sales as outlook weakens for new console cycle
snippet: Nintendo has set Switch 2 US price at $499.99, up $50, and expects to sell 16.5 million units by FY2027, down from 19.86 million previously. The update, reported by CNBC, signals a softer sales outlook as the company moves into its next console cycle.

title: AI study finds hidden mathematical laws shaping cuisines across cultures
snippet: A new study reveals that recipes follow mathematical laws, much like human language. Researchers at IIIT-Delhi used AI to analyse over 118,000 recipes from 26 cuisines. They found four statistical laws shaping cooking globally.

title: PB Fintech gets Sebi nod to operate as stockbroker in NSE debt segment
snippet: PB Fintech's subsidiary, PB Marketing and Consulting Private Limited, has secured regulatory approval from Sebi. This allows it to function as a stockbroker in the National Stock Exchange's debt segment. The approval is effective from May 08, 2026.
